query: INSERT INTO __drizzle_migrations (hash, created_at) SELECT '0033_natural_red_ghost', UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM __drizzle_migrations WHERE hash = '0033_natural_red_ghost');
